ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Guard, Forward, Center) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted into the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of referees officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_pm" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the coach (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "mvp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Most Valuable Player of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the playoff belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., Quarterfinals, Semifinals) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team in the playoff game */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team in the playoff game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
